nodes.name: 摩鹿加群岛
nodes.summary: 摩鹿加群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联42种鸟类，包括白腹麻鸭、Goliath coucal、Moluccan brush cuckoo等42种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Lichmera
nodes.summary: Lichmera（Lichmera）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Scaly-crowned honeyeater、Olive honeyeater、Brown honeyeater等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Scaly-breasted honeyeater
nodes.summary: The scaly-breasted honeyeater (Lichmera squamata), also known as the white-tufted honeyeater, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Indonesia, where it occurs in the southern Moluccas. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, and subtropical or tropical mangrove forests. References
